activities.description: Depart Copenhagen (CPH) · SAS flight SK1593 → Brussels (BRU) 14:30
activities.details: Daily nonstop, ~1h35 flight. Check in online from 22h before departure. Terminal 3 at CPH. Arrive at airport by 11:30.

activities.description: Arrival at Brussels Airport (BRU)
activities.details: Brussels Airport (Zaventem) is a single terminal. Baggage claim is typically 20–30 min after landing for Schengen flights.

activities.description: Transfer Brussels Airport → Kortrijk (~1.5 hours by coach/taxi)
activities.details: By taxi/private transfer: ~€80–100, ~1h15. By train: Brussels-Airport-Zaventem → Brussels-Midi → Kortrijk (IC, ~1h45 total with connection). Book private transfer in advance for convenience.

activities.description: Check-in at hotel in Kortrijk (TBD)
activities.details: Hotel to be confirmed. Central options: Pullman Kortrijk, Park Inn by Radisson Kortrijk, or NH Kortrijk — all within walking distance of the Grote Markt.

activities.description: Dinner & drinks in Kortrijk
activities.details: The Grote Markt and surrounding streets offer a wide selection of restaurants. Recommended: Den Hoed (Belgian classics) or Brasserie Den Dyver.

activities.description: Train or coach from Kortrijk to Ghent (~30 minutes)
activities.details: NMBS Intercity trains run every 30 min between Kortrijk and Ghent-Sint-Pieters. A return ticket is ~€10–15 pp. No reservation needed.

activities.description: Sightseeing in Ghent: Gravensteen, Graslei, Korenlei
activities.details: Gravensteen (Castle of the Counts) dates to 1180 and offers panoramic views. Graslei and Korenlei are the iconic medieval guild-house quays along the Leie river — the heart of Ghent.

activities.description: Lunch in Ghent
activities.details: The Patershol neighbourhood is Ghent's culinary heartland. Try Pakhuis (brasserie in a former warehouse) or Het Pand for a casual waterside lunch.

activities.description: Beer tasting at a local brewery
activities.details: Gruut Gentse Stadsbrouwerij brews unique herb-based beers and offers guided tastings in the city centre. Book in advance. Alternatively, Stadsbrouwerij De Struise is nearby.

activities.description: Return to Kortrijk (~30 minutes)
activities.details: IC trains back to Kortrijk depart Ghent-Sint-Pieters approximately every 30 min throughout the evening.

activities.description: Dinner & drinks in Kortrijk
activities.details: Relaxed evening ahead of the early race-day start. The Broelkaai area along the Leie river has several bars and restaurants with outdoor terraces.

activities.description: Early night — 05:00 wake-up tomorrow!
activities.details: Race day starts brutally early. Aim to be in bed by 21:00 to get a decent night's sleep before the 05:00 alarm.

activities.description: Early wake-up and breakfast
activities.details: Check whether the hotel offers an early breakfast service — arrange this in advance. Alternatively, pastries and coffee are served on the Go4Cycling bus.

activities.description: Meeting point in Kortrijk – Go4Cycling VIP bus
activities.details: Confirm the exact pick-up point with Go4Cycling before the trip. Have your booking confirmation ready.

activities.description: Transfer Kortrijk → Compiègne (~2h) with coffee, tea & pastries
activities.details: ~250 km by coach. Compiègne is the traditional start city of Paris-Roubaix since 1977. Pastries and hot drinks served on board.

activities.description: Start area in Compiègne – experience team buses and preparations
activities.details: WorldTour team buses line the start route through the city centre. Riders do sign-on at the podium. A unique chance to get close to the pros before the flag drops.

activities.description: Return to bus
activities.details: Meet back at the agreed bus location promptly — the bus departs before the race start to position at the first viewing point.

activities.description: Bus departs – race starts at 10:15, follow from key positions along the route
activities.details: The peloton is neutralised through Compiègne city before the race goes live. The bus heads to the first strategic roadside position. Go4Cycling plans multiple stops along the course including iconic cobbled sectors — exact locations confirmed closer to race day.

activities.description: Lunch break with packed meal & CAVA on board
activities.details: Lunch is served while the bus repositions between sectors. CAVA and soft drinks included.

activities.description: Live experience at multiple strategic points
activities.details: Key sectors to watch for: Trouée d'Arenberg (km 162, ★★★★★), Mons-en-Pévèle (km 200, ★★★★), Carrefour de l'Arbre (km 238, ★★★★★). Cobblestones are rough — wear comfortable shoes.

activities.description: Arrival at Roubaix Velodrome – finish line!
activities.details: The Vélodrome André Pétrieux dates to 1936 and holds ~8,000 spectators for the finish. VIP access included. The winner's shower in the famous communal showers is a tradition.

activities.description: Return to Kortrijk
activities.details: ~1h drive from Roubaix Velodrome back to Kortrijk. Roubaix is just across the Belgian border.

activities.description: Dinner & drinks — relive the day's madness
activities.details: Celebrate at a restaurant in Kortrijk. Consider booking in advance — the area sees race-day crowds on Paris-Roubaix Sunday.

activities.description: Breakfast and hotel check-out
activities.details: Standard checkout is 12:00 noon, but confirm with the hotel. Luggage storage is usually available if you want to explore Kortrijk in the morning before heading to the airport.

activities.description: Transfer Kortrijk → Brussels Airport (~1.5 hours by coach/taxi)
activities.details: Brussels Airport (BRU) is ~75 km from Kortrijk, typically 1h–1h20 by car depending on traffic. Book a taxi or private transfer the day before.

activities.description: Arrive Brussels Airport (BRU) · check in for departure
activities.details: Check-in desks close 45 min before departure. Security is typically 20–30 min. SAS desks are in Terminal 1 (Schengen departures).

activities.description: SAS flight SK1594: Brussels (BRU) 15:10 → Copenhagen (CPH) 16:40
activities.details: Daily nonstop, ~1h30. Arrives CPH Terminal 3. Based on current SAS timetable — verify at flysas.com once the 2027 schedule is published.
